# kUSBInformationDeviceIsOnThunderboltBit

**Enumeration Case**

The bit indicating that the USB device is on a Thunderbolt port.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsOnThunderboltBit = 13
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsOnThunderboltBit
